overview: Dr. Maria Kraszynska specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) and alternative medicine for hormone-related conditions. The practice uses an evidence-based approach to personalized medical care, including hormonal testing, natural supplements, and anti-aging medicine.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy for men and women
Natural supplements and nutritional support through alternative medicine store
targetAudience: Adults experiencing hormonal imbalances related to menopause, perimenopause, andropause, or other hormone-related conditions.
